title: plagiobothrys bracteatus
intro: Plagiobothrys bracteatus, also known as Bracted Poppy Moonflower, is a type of flowering plant in the borage family that is native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Plagiobothrys bracteatus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and it may also be used in combination with other herbs in various herbal preparations to enhance its medicinal properties.
